description: Generated wsdl-2-mcp MCP manifest for DHL Express shipment tracking.

notes: DHL does not publish one omnibus 'DHL WSDL'; each DHL Express XML-PI service (tracking, shipment, rating, etc.) has its own SOAP endpoint/WSDL.
This manifest pins the official DHL Express Tracking service WSDL, publicly fetchable without authentication at https://wsbexpress.dhl.com/sndpt/glDHLExpressTrack?WSDL.

The endpoint URL is directly hyperlinked in DHL's official first-party 'MyDHL API - SOAP Developer Guide' PDF (v2.33), hosted at https://developer.dhl.com/sites/default/files/2025-04/DHL%20EXPRESS%20-%20MyDHL%20API%20-%20SOAP%20Developer%20Guide%20-%20v2.33.pdf.
Verified source SHA-256: b10e25d039c3002947d855db1a61c82dc2ac15cb22a0229f40b313b4b769a86f, confirmed byte-identical across two separate fetches.
Defines portType/service gblDHLExpressTrack with a single operation, trackShipmentRequest, at the fixed endpoint https://wsbexpress.dhl.com/sndpt/glDHLExpressTrack.
Auth models DHL XML-PI's standard transport-level HTTP Basic Authentication (site ID / password); the SOAP request body itself carries only ServiceHeader/MessageReference fields, no credentials.
